production_note: agentic_K1 dual-LLM skeptic: sealed receipt write; packet-only; no bulk writers; no identity stamps
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior + active packet content.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": ["C001", None]})
print(int(df["id"].isna().sum()))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Campos required con nulls: el paquete cuenta 1 null en id antes de imputar; no rellenar a ciegas un required (T1-A).
Mapa de nulos solo sobre columnas required con n>0 → {'a':1}; ignora opcionales vacíos según el gate de T1-A.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": [None]})
print("fail" if int(df["id"].isna().sum()) > 0 else "pass")
exercises.justification_from_packet: Gate fail-closed: required con null implica 'fail', no continuar el pipeline como si el schema estuviera limpio (T1-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"monto": [1.0, None]})
df["was_null"] = df["monto"].isna()
df["monto"] = df["monto"].fillna(0)
print(df["was_null"].tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: was_null se captura antes del fillna para auditar imputación: [False, True] en el fixture de T1-B.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, None, None, 2.0])
rate = float(s.isna().mean())
print("blocked" if rate > 0.3 else "ok")
exercises.justification_from_packet: null_rate 0.5 supera el cap 0.3 → blocked; el theory prohíbe imputar cuando la tasa de nulos rompe el umbral (T1-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, 2.0, None])
med = s.median()
print(s.fillna(med).tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Imputar con mediana 1.5 solo tras pasar el cap: null se reemplaza y la serie queda [1.0,2.0,1.5] (T1-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"a": [1, 1, 2], "b": [0, 0, 9]})
print(int(df.duplicated(keep=False).sum()))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Duplicados exactos con keep=False marcan ambas copias; el conteo del fixture es 2 filas exact-dup (T2-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"cliente_id": ["C001", "C001", "C002"], "region": ["Lima", "Cusco", "Lima"]})
nu = df.groupby("cliente_id")["region"].nunique()
print(nu[nu > 1].index.tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Conflicto de clave: mismo id C001 con regiones distintas → ['C001']; no es dup exacto, es multi-atributo (T2-A).
Una fila sin dups ni multi-región se clasifica 'clean'; el contrato de taxonomía exact/conflicto/clean de T2-A.

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": ["a", "a", "b"], "v": [1, 2, 3]})
qmask = df.duplicated(subset=["id"], keep=False)
quarantine = df[qmask].copy()
clean = df.drop_duplicates(subset=["id"], keep="first")
print(len(quarantine), len(clean))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Split quarantine/clean: duplicated keep=False manda 2 a cuarentena y deja 2 clean con drop keep first (T2-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": ["a", "a"], "batch": ["b1", "b2"]})
quarantine = df[df.duplicated(subset=["id"], keep=False)].copy()
print(quarantine.columns.tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: La cuarentena debe conservar la columna batch (evidencia del fixture) para auditoría; no dropear metadatos al separar (T2-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": ["a", "b"], "v": [1, 2]})
print("card_ok" if df["id"].nunique() == len(df) else "card_fail")
exercises.justification_from_packet: Cardinalidad 1:1: nunique(id)==len(df) → card_ok; si no, hay ids repetidos tras el split (T2-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([" lima ", "CUSCO"])
print(s.str.strip().str.title().tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Normalización de strings del paquete: strip+title sobre [' lima ','CUSCO'] produce ['Lima','Cusco'] sin borrar el raw (T3-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series(["S/1.5", "S/2"])
v = s.str.replace("S/", "", regex=False).astype(float)
print(float(v.sum()))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Parse de montos PEN: quitar prefijo S/ y castear float; suma del fixture ['S/1.5','S/2'] = 3.5 (T3-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"region_raw": ["lima"]})
df["region"] = df["region_raw"].str.title()
print(bool((df["region_raw"] == "lima").all()), df["region"].tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Conservar region_raw al crear region canónica permite auditar la transformación; raw sigue 'lima' y canónica 'Lima' (T3-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, -2.0, 3.0])
print((s < 0).tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: Domain bounds: monto < 0 → domain_error; máscara booleana del fixture [F,T,F] sin dropear filas aún (T3-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, 2.0, 3.0, 100.0])
q1, q3 = s.quantile(0.25), s.quantile(0.75)
iqr = q3 - q1
mask = (s < q1 - 1.5 * iqr) | (s > q3 + 1.5 * iqr)
print(s[mask].tolist())
exercises.justification_from_packet: IQR 1.5× marca outliers estadísticos: en [1,2,3,100] el 100.0 es flag stat, no necesariamente error de dominio (T3-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
s = pd.Series([1.0, 2.0, -1.0])
val = s.iloc[2]
print("error" if val < 0 else "ok")
exercises.justification_from_packet: Prioridad del etiquetado: domain error gana sobre flag IQR; valor -1 se clasifica 'error' no solo 'flag' (T3-B).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1]})
required = ["id", "monto"]
print([c for c in required if c not in df.columns])
exercises.justification_from_packet: Columnas required faltantes: con schema ['id','monto'] y DF solo id, la lista de drift es ['monto'] (T4-A).
Regla cross-field temporal: índices donde fin < inicio → [1] en el fixture; cada regla se reporta aparte (T4-A).

exercises.code:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.DataFrame({"id": [1]})
missing = [c for c in ["id", "monto"] if c not in df.columns]
print("drift" if missing else "schema_ok")
exercises.justification_from_packet: Schema drift gate fail-closed: si faltan required se imprime 'drift', no se rellena con defaults silenciosos (T4-A).

exercises.code:
rows_in = 10
q = 3
print(rows_in - q)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Métrica del reporte del gate: rows_clean = rows_in - quarantine_n; con 10 y 3 cuarentenadas → 7 (T4-B).

exercises.code:
audit = [{"event": "start"}]
audit.append({"event": "quarantine"})
print(len(audit))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Audit append-only: se agrega un evento quarantine y len(audit) crece; no reescribir historial (T4-B).

exercises.code:
n_q = 1
print(False if n_q > 0 else True)
exercises.justification_from_packet: metrics.pass=False si quarantine>0; con n_q=1 el gate publica pass False y aún así emite métricas (T4-B).

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Required con nulls → violación/cuarentena o fail del gate.
Exacto=filas idénticas; conflicto=misma clave atributos distintos.
region_raw permite auditar canónica sin perder evidencia.
IQR sin domain bounds puede marcar colas legítimas.
Gate falla → publicar métricas y cuarentena aunque pass=False.
